description_long: This watermill features a two-story timber-framed building with a stone foundation and a prominent blue-tiled gabled roof. The structure includes a large vertical water wheel attached to one side, constructed from wood with visible spokes and paddles. A tall cylindrical chimney rises from the rear corner, suggesting the presence of a furnace or kiln inside. The building has a wooden balcony and deck area, supported by posts, with barrels and crates placed nearby, and a signboard hanging from the upper story. Windows are multi-paned with a lattice pattern and emit a warm yellow glow, while the exterior walls combine timber beams and plaster infill. The mill sits atop a stone base, with a small wooden dock and a patch of green moss or algae visible near the water wheel.
description: A timber-framed, two-story watermill with a blue-tiled gabled roof, large wooden water wheel, stone foundation, and glowing lattice windows.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wooden balcony, hanging sign, two glowing lattice windows, and the tall chimney at the rear.
description_view_1: Narrow end view highlighting the chimney, timber framing, and the edge of the water wheel, with barrels and crates visible on the stone base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view featuring the full water wheel, wooden dock, mossy patch, and the main entrance area beneath the balcony.
description_view_3: Rear end view displaying the timber-framed gable, small window, and the back of the water wheel and dock.
attribute_water_wheel: Large vertical overshot wooden water wheel, approximately 2.5 meters in diameter, constructed from dark timber with 12 visible paddles and a spoked hub; shows slight wear and moss at the base.
attribute_building_structure: Two-story structure with timber framing and plaster infill, stone foundation, and wooden balcony; features architectural overhangs and a tall cylindrical chimney.
attribute_roof_type: Gabled roof with blue ceramic tiles, moderate overhangs, and a single tall chimney at the rear.
attribute_window_style: Rectangular, multi-pane lattice windows with wooden frames, emitting a warm yellow glow; no shutters or additional decorative features.
